task_completion.description: Verify the spreadsheet contains the list of 5 household appliances and their warranty periods.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a spreadsheet containing rows for Refrigerator, Dishwasher, Washing Machine, Microwave, and Water Heater, along with columns for purchase dates and warranty periods (e.g., 12, 24, 36, 120 months).

task_completion.description: Verify the expiration dates are calculated and displayed.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a column showing warranty expiration dates. Expected dates include: Refrigerator 2025-01-15, Dishwasher 2023-08-20, Washing Machine 2027-03-10, Microwave 2022-11-05, Water Heater 2030-06-18.

task_completion.description: Verify the days remaining until expiration are calculated.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a column displaying the number of days remaining (integer values). Some values should be negative (for already expired appliances like the Microwave or Dishwasher).

task_completion.description: Verify the automated status categorization is present.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a status column containing text labels such as 'Expired', 'Expiring Soon', or 'Active' based on the days remaining.

task_completion.description: Verify visual alerts (conditional formatting) are applied to the warranty statuses.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for color-coded cells in the spreadsheet (e.g., red background/text for 'Expired', yellow/orange for 'Expiring Soon', green for 'Active').

task_completion.description: Verify the tracking system is saved to the correct path with the correct filename.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the application title bar, tab name, or a 'Save As' dialog box confirming the file is named 'warranty_tracker.xlsx' and is located in '/home/ga/Documents/'.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used a graphical spreadsheet application (like LibreOffice Calc) rather than a terminal script.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the GUI of a spreadsheet application being actively used.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used formulas for calculations rather than typing in hardcoded results.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look at the formula bar in the spreadsheet application when a calculated cell (expiration date, days remaining, or status) is selected. It should show formulas like =EDATE(...), =TODAY(), or =IF(...) rather than raw text/numbers.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the conditional formatting menu to create visual alerts.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for screenshots showing the 'Conditional Formatting' dialog box or rules manager being configured, rather than the agent just manually changing cell background colors.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The spreadsheet must track 5 appliances: Refrigerator, Dishwasher, Washing Machine, Microwave, Water Heater. Expected expiration dates are: Refrigerator 2025-01-15, Dishwasher 2023-08-20, Washing Machine 2027-03-10, Microwave 2022-11-05, Water Heater 2030-06-18. Status logic should categorize items as Expired (days < 0), Expiring Soon (days < 90), or Active (otherwise). The file must be saved as warranty_tracker.xlsx in /home/ga/Documents/.
